name: Divine Favor
description: Your prayer empowers you with divine radiance. Until the spell ends, your weapon attacks deal an extra 1d4 radiant damage on a hit.
effect: +1d4 radiant damage on all weapon attacks for 1 minute (concentration)
notes: Cast as bonus action — allows attacking same turn
Concentration — pairs with weapon attacks, not spell damage
Radiant bonus damage applies to every weapon hit while concentration holds
